SYNTHETIC REPORT - NOT A REAL PATIENT - GENERATED FOR PRISM TESTING
SYNTHETIC CLINICAL SUMMARY
Patient ID: SYNTH-DOC-0001
Collected: 2024-06-20

Referred for irregular cycles and suspected hyperandrogenism.
Total Testosterone: 2.9 nmol/L (Ref: 0.5 - 2.4)
SHBG: 21 nmol/L (Ref: 18 - 114)

[PAGE 2]
Pelvic ultrasound performed at the same visit.
Right ovary volume: 13.1 mL
Right ovary: 22 antral follicles

IMPRESSION: Findings are consistent with polycystic ovarian morphology.

End of synthetic report.
